since_last: 37% of 84 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.63%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 37% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.43% · BTC -1.97% · Gold -1.88% · Nasdaq100 -0.14%. 37% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.63%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.63%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.37%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: BABA is the standout at +11.02%
cards.body: Leaders: BABA +11.02%, AVGO +6.35%, ANET +5.96%, AMBA +4.80%, BIDU +4.70%. Laggards: PANW -5.02%, UPST -4.84%, ZS -4.41%, PLTR -4.12%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.03% at $149.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.03% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
